case_title: SF GREEN CAB LLC VS. WALAA SADEK ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,347.44 FILED BY SF GREEN CAB LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SADEK, WALAA YOUSIF, HUSSEIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (MARK GRUBERG) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF GREEN CAB LLC
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-05-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-05-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SF GREEN CAB LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALAA SADEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HASSEIN YOUSEF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CAME WITH INSURANCE REPRESENTATIVE AND PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
